package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for placeholder_seed_function_in_production: Seed entrypoints in production code that are still TODO-shaped or effectively no-ops.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule114NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule114NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule114NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario114Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule114NegativeService, input Rule114NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
